chain.title: Job Interview from Screening to Offer

title: Chain 1/8: Phone Screening
scene: HR 打电话做初步筛选。（对话链：求职面试）

turns.cn: 您好，我是 ABC 公司的招聘。
turns.en: Hi, I'm calling from ABC Company recruiting.

turns.cn: 您好，我现在方便说话。
turns.en: Hello. Yes, this is a good time to talk.

turns.cn: 您目前在职吗？最早什么时候能入职？
turns.en: Are you currently employed? When could you start?

turns.cn: 在职，需要两周通知期。
turns.en: Yes. I'd need to give two weeks' notice.

turns.cn: 需要现场面试吗？您方便来办公室吗？
turns.en: Can you come in for an on-site interview?

turns.cn: 可以，下周任意工作日下午都行。
turns.en: Sure. Any weekday afternoon next week works.

turns.cn: 好的，我发日历邀请给您。
turns.en: Great. I'll send you a calendar invite.

chain.title: Job Interview from Screening to Offer

title: Chain 2/8: Arrive at Reception
scene: 面试当天，你到了公司前台。（对话链：求职面试）

turns.cn: 你好，我约了下午两点面试，张伟。
turns.en: Hi, I have an interview at two PM. Zhang Wei.

turns.cn: 请稍坐，我通知面试官。
turns.en: Please have a seat. I'll let them know.

turns.cn: 需要填访客表吗？
turns.en: Do I need to fill out a visitor form?

turns.cn: 请在这签名，戴上访客牌。
turns.en: Please sign here and wear this visitor badge.

turns.cn: 洗手间在哪？
turns.en: Where's the restroom?

turns.cn: 左转尽头。他们马上来。
turns.en: Down the hall on the left. They'll be right out.

chain.title: Job Interview from Screening to Offer

title: Chain 3/8: Self Introduction
scene: 面试官请你做自我介绍。（对话链：求职面试）

turns.cn: 请坐，感谢您今天过来。
turns.en: Please have a seat. Thank you for coming in today.

turns.cn: 谢谢给我这个机会。
turns.en: Thank you for the opportunity.

turns.cn: 先简单介绍一下自己吧。
turns.en: Tell me a little about yourself.

turns.cn: 我有五年软件开发经验，擅长前端。
turns.en: I have five years of software development experience, mostly in front-end.

turns.cn: 为什么想加入我们公司？
turns.en: Why do you want to join our company?

turns.cn: 我很认同你们的产品理念，也想在更大平台成长。
turns.en: I admire your product vision and want to grow on a larger platform.

chain.title: Job Interview from Screening to Offer

title: Chain 4/8: Technical Questions
scene: 面试官开始问技术问题。（对话链：求职面试）

turns.cn: 讲一个你最有挑战的项目。
turns.en: Tell me about your most challenging project.

turns.cn: 去年做过千人并发直播页，要优化首屏。
turns.en: Last year I built a live-streaming page for thousands of concurrent users. I had to optimize first paint.

turns.cn: 具体怎么优化的？
turns.en: How did you optimize it specifically?

turns.cn: 代码分割、懒加载、CDN，首屏从四秒降到一点二秒。
turns.en: Code splitting, lazy loading, and CDN. First paint dropped from four seconds to one point two.

turns.cn: 团队里你负责什么？
turns.en: What was your role on the team?

turns.cn: 前端负责人，带两个人。
turns.en: Front-end lead. I managed two developers.

chain.title: Job Interview from Screening to Offer

title: Chain 5/8: Behavioral Questions
scene: 面试官问团队合作和冲突处理。（对话链：求职面试）

turns.cn: 说一次你和同事意见不合的经历。
turns.en: Tell me about a time you disagreed with a colleague.

turns.cn: 和产品经理在排期上有分歧，我提议先做 MVP。
turns.en: A PM and I disagreed on timeline. I proposed shipping an MVP first.

turns.cn: 结果怎么样？
turns.en: How did it turn out?

turns.cn: 两周上线核心功能，数据验证后再迭代。
turns.en: We launched core features in two weeks and iterated after data validated.

turns.cn: 你从中学到什么？
turns.en: What did you learn from that?

turns.cn: 先对齐目标，用数据说话。
turns.en: Align on goals first and let data guide decisions.

chain.title: Job Interview from Screening to Offer

title: Chain 6/8: Your Questions
scene: 面试官问你有什么问题。（对话链：求职面试）

turns.cn: 您有什么问题想问我们吗？
turns.en: Do you have any questions for us?

turns.cn: 团队目前最大的挑战是什么？
turns.en: What's the biggest challenge the team is facing right now?

turns.cn: 主要是产品迭代速度和质量的平衡。
turns.en: Mainly balancing speed of delivery with quality.

turns.cn: 新人入职有哪些培训？
turns.en: What kind of onboarding do new hires get?

turns.cn: 有两周导师制，还有内部技术分享。
turns.en: Two weeks of mentorship plus internal tech talks.

turns.cn: 决策流程是怎样的？
turns.en: How are decisions typically made?

turns.cn: 小团队自治，大方向由管理层定。
turns.en: Small teams are autonomous. Leadership sets the direction.

chain.title: Job Interview from Screening to Offer

title: Chain 7/8: Salary Talk
scene: HR 来电谈录用条件和薪资。（对话链：求职面试）

turns.cn: 恭喜您通过终面，我们想发 offer。
turns.en: Congratulations on passing the final round. We'd like to extend an offer.

turns.cn: 谢谢！职位和团队我都很有兴趣。
turns.en: Thank you! I'm very interested in the role and the team.

turns.cn: 年薪九万五，含标准福利。
turns.en: The base salary is ninety-five thousand, with standard benefits.

turns.cn: 根据我的经验和市场行情，希望能到十万。
turns.en: Based on my experience and the market, I'd hope for a hundred thousand.

turns.cn: 我们最多九万八，加签字费两千。
turns.en: We can do ninety-eight thousand plus a two-thousand signing bonus.

turns.cn: 可以接受，入职日能定在两周后吗？
turns.en: I can accept that. Can my start date be two weeks from now?

chain.title: Job Interview from Screening to Offer

title: Chain 8/8: Accept the Offer
scene: 你收到正式 offer 邮件，回电话确认。（对话链：求职面试）

turns.cn: offer 邮件收到了吗？有问题吗？
turns.en: Did you get the offer email? Any questions?

turns.cn: 收到了，条款都清楚，我接受。
turns.en: Yes. Everything is clear. I accept.

turns.cn: 请签电子合同，周一入职九点报到。
turns.en: Please sign the e-contract. Report Monday at nine AM.

turns.cn: 需要带什么材料？
turns.en: What documents should I bring?

turns.cn: 护照、社会安全卡、银行账户信息。
turns.en: Passport, Social Security card, and bank account details.

turns.cn: 好的，周一见。
turns.en: Okay. See you Monday.
